description_long: This object is a large, dark-bladed sword with an elongated, slightly curved blade that tapers to a fine point at both ends. The blade is wide and appears to have a smooth, continuous surface with no visible serrations or notches. The handle is short and robust, seamlessly integrated into the central body of the sword, and lacks any visible wrapping or grip texture. There is no visible crossguard or hand protection, giving the sword a streamlined, almost organic silhouette. The entire object is a deep, dark brown or black color, with a subtle sheen that suggests a metallic or polished finish. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements.
description: A large, dark, double-edged sword with a wide, smooth blade and a short, integrated handle, featuring a minimalist and streamlined design.
description_view_0: The sword is seen edge-on, highlighting its long, thin profile and symmetrical blade tapering to points at both ends.
description_view_1: The sword is viewed from the side, revealing the wide, slightly curved blade and the short, central handle.
description_view_2: The sword is shown from the opposite edge, again emphasizing the symmetrical, elongated blade and the central handle.
description_view_3: The side view from the opposite direction displays the same wide, curved blade and short handle, mirroring view 1.
attribute_handle_design: short, integrated, smooth, no visible grip texture or wrapping
